documentation.text:
@title SafeMath
 @dev Math operations with safety checks that throw on error

@title ERC20 interface
 @dev see https://github.com/ethereum/EIPs/issues/20

@title Basic token
 @dev Basic version of StandardToken, with no allowances.

@dev The Ownable constructor sets the original `owner` of the contract to the sender
 account.
@dev Throws if called by any account other than the owner.

@dev Allows the current owner to transfer control of the contract to a newOwner.
 @param newOwner The address to transfer ownership to.

@title Pausable
 @dev Base contract which allows children to implement an emergency stop mechanism.
@dev modifier to allow actions only when the contract IS paused
@dev modifier to allow actions only when the contract IS NOT paused
@dev called by the owner to pause, triggers stopped state
@dev called by the owner to unpause, returns to normal state

Pausable token
 Simple ERC20 Token example, with pausable token creation*

@title REP2 Token
 @dev REP2 Mintable Token with migration from legacy contract

@dev Creates a new RepToken instance
 @param _legacyRepContract Address of the legacy ERC20Basic REP contract to migrate balances from
@dev Unpauses the contract with the caveat added that it can only happen after initialization.

devdoc.details: Base contract which allows children to implement an emergency stop mechanism.

pause().details: called by the owner to pause, triggers stopped state

transferOwnership(address).details: Allows the current owner to transfer control of the contract to a newOwner.

params.newOwner: The address to transfer ownership to.

unpause().details: called by the owner to unpause, returns to normal state
